mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: UserWarning: Pydantic serializer warnings:   PydanticSerializationUnexpectedValue(Expected 9 fields but got 6: ...
mission.description: [Bug]: UserWarning: Pydantic serializer warnings:   PydanticSerializationUnexpectedValue(Expected 9 fields but got 6: .... This issue affects 43+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### What happened?

When upgrading from LiteLLM 1.72.4 to 1.72.6, I now get a pydantic Serialization warning about unexpected values.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: UserWarning: Pydantic serializer warnings:  …
steps.description:
> https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/11981#issuecomment-3005672128
> 
> Workaround:
> ```py
> import warnings
> warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', category=UserWarning, module='pydantic')
> ```

Won't this disable all `UserWarning`s, regardless of whether they originate from `litellm`?
```yaml
/Users/nbrake/scm/any-agent/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pydantic/main.py:464: UserWarning: Pydantic serializer warnings:
  PydanticSerializationUnexpectedValue(Expected 9 fields but got 6: Expected `Message` - serialized value may not be as expected [input_value=Message(content=None, rol...: None}, annotations=[]), input_type=Message])
  PydanticSerializationUnexpectedValue(Expected `StreamingChoices` - serialized value may not be as expected [input_value=Choices(finish_reason='to...ider_specific_fields={}), input_type=Choices])
  return self.__pydantic_serializer__.to_python(
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: UserWarning: Pydantic serializer warnings:… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
> https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/11981#issuecomment-3005672128
> 
> Workaround:
> ```py
> import warnings
> warnings.filterwarnings('ignore', category=UserWarning, module='pydantic')
> ```

Won't this disable all `UserWarning`s, regardless of whether they originate from `litellm`?

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
